zh.lifeSummary: 當Amery de Barton於大約1255年出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓時，她的父親Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,55歲，母親Cecilla35歲。她於大約1290年與Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1295年在英國藍卡爾皮爾金頓享年42歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾皮爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amery de Barton于大约1255年出生在英国藍卡爾巴頓时，她的父亲Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,55岁，母亲Cecilla35岁。她于大约1290年与Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1295年在英国藍卡爾皮爾金頓享年42岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾皮爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English bere or bær ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, i.e. an outlying grange. Compare Barwick . The name is also found in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bartún.

Polish (Bartoń); Czech and Slovak (mainly Bartoň): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bartłomiej, Czech Bartoloměj, Slovak Bartolomej, from Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Barwick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Berwick or Barwick, for example in Northumberland, Norfolk, Somerset, and Yorkshire, from Old English bere ‘barley’ + wīc ‘outlying farm building’, i.e. a granary lying some distance away from the main settlement.
North German: habitational name from a place called Berwick, near Soest, in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Amery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages from a Norman French pronunciation of   Alfred .  It is used mainly as a boy's name in Britain, while in North America it is more popular as a girl's name.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Amery de Barton was born about 1255, in Barton, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,, was 55 and her mother, Cecilla, was 35. She married Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr about 1290. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1295, in Pilkington, Lancashire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Pilkington, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amery de Barton est née environ 1255, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Cecilla, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr environ 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1295, à Pilkington, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Pilkington, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amery de Barton um 1255 in Barton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton, 55 und ihre Mutter Cecilla 35. Sie hat um 1290 Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1295 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Pilkington, Lancashire, England und wurde in Pilkington, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amery de Barton è nata il circa 1255 nel Barton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Cecilla, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr circa 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1295, nel Pilkington, Lancashire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Pilkington, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Amery de Bartonが約1255年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,は55歳，母Cecillaは35歳であった。約1290年にSir Roger de Pilkington Snrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1295年にイギリスランカシュアイアピルキントンで42歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアピルキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amery de Barton(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilla(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1290년 Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 영국 랭카실르 피킨그턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 피킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amery de Barton nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton,, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Cecilla, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr aproximadamente 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1295, em Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amery de Barton родилась около 1255 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gilbert de Barton de Notton, было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilla, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr около 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1295 г. в местности пилкингтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности пилкингтон, ланкашир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr aproximadamente 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1295, en Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
